title: Romantic Creamy Dutch Pasta
description: A creamy, rich, and indulgent Dutch pasta dish perfect for a romantic dinner. The coconut cream and smoked paprika add a sensual touch to this vermicelli pasta recipe.
instructions: Cook the vermicelli pasta according to the package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut cream and heavy cream, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let it cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the grated Parmesan cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked vermicelli pasta to the skillet and toss everything together until well coated in the creamy sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
